title: Combination licenses (includes all hunting, fishing, and WMA access privileges); fees
doc_html:
§3004. Combination licenses (includes all hunting, fishing, and WMA access privileges); fees

            A. Resident licenses:

(1) Sportsman's Paradise$100.00/year

            (2) Senior/Retired Military/Honorably Discharged Veteran $20.00/year

            (3) Disabled/Special Needs                                                   $4.00/year

B. Nonresident licenses:

(1) Sportsman's Paradise$400.00/year

(2) Five-Day Blast and Cast$120.00

            Acts 2021, No. 356, §3, eff. June 1, 2022; Acts 2022, No. 229, §1, eff. June 1, 2022; Acts 2025, No. 321, §1.
